# entrópica

entrópica is an energy-led tropical architecture studio based in panamá, central america. founded in 2020 by josé barría, a registered architect with a master of environmental building design from the university of pennsylvania.

## what we do

we design buildings and spaces in hot, humid tropical climates using climate science and energy modelling as primary design tools. shade, ventilation, thermal mass, and envelope performance are not afterthoughts here — they are the first design move.

services: conceptual design, full architectural documentation, building permits (panamá), energy and daylight consulting, leed/edge support, interior fit-outs.

## location and contact

office: ph plaza mar, paitilla, ciudad de panamá, panamá
email: info@entropica-lab.com
phone: +507 6944-4740
coordinates: 8.974904602770444, -79.51278964689152

## the work

selected projects across residential, commercial, and institutional typologies in panamá and internationally. notable work includes:

- l34: mixed-use building, ciudad de panamá
- lotus hall: institutional, panamá
- private bank offices: commercial fit-out, panamá
- casa tn: 280 m² family residence, chumico, panamá
- current technologies: daylight-led office fit-out, clayton, panamá
- eurostone showroom: interior concept, ciudad de panamá
- atlantic research: residential, panamá

## resources

open guides, case studies, and insights on bioclimatic architecture, tropical building physics, and climate-responsive design. key resource: /blog/sustainable-architecture-panama — a plain-language guide to sustainable architecture in panamá.

## languages

spanish (default) and english. the site is bilingual: / (es) and /en/ (en).

## legal

watts & matter consulting, s. e. p. · est. 2020
